blocks.description: Program header (complete ODS reporting suite v3.0, Corporate Reporting Team — Executive Analytics Division, report ID RPT-EXEC-2026-Q1, distribution CEO/CFO/COO/VP Sales/VP HR/Board, report period Q1 FY2026, change log v1.0-v3.0 by R. Nakamura/S. Patel/K. O'Brien), Section 1 header; OPTIONS mprint mlogic symbolgen nocenter ls=200 ps=65 validvarname=v7 nofmterr msglevel=i nodate nonumber; LIBNAME for sales (/data/enterprise/sales readonly), hr (/data/enterprise/hr readonly), finance (/data/enterprise/finance readonly), rptout (/reports/executive/output); %LET for report_period=Q1-2026, fiscal_year=2026, report_format=PDF, period_start_dt via %SYSFUNC(MDY 1/1/2026), period_end_dt via MDY(3/31/2026), prior_start_dt, prior_end_dt, report_author=R. Nakamura, report_title=Executive Management Report, run_timestamp, run_date; distribution params dist_list (5 emails), report_style=journal, output_path, report_rc=0, sections_done=0
%INCLUDE '/reports/shared/report_templates.sas' for shared report formatting templates and utilities

Section 2 header (Macro Definitions); %MACRO setup_ods(format=PDF, title=Executive Report, style=journal) opening: documentation header for ODS output initialization by format with custom styling; %LOCAL output_file timestamp_str; %LET timestamp_str via %SYSFUNC(PUTN/DATETIME, datetime15.), output_file path construction with report_period and timestamp; %PUT banner with format, style, output_file
%IF &format = PDF inside setup_ods: ODS PDF FILE= with style, bookmarkgen=yes, pdftoc=3, compress=9, author=report_author, title with report_period; ODS PDF SELECT ALL; %END

%IF &format = HTML inside setup_ods: ODS HTML with path=output_path, file=exec_report.html, style, contents=toc.html for navigation, frame=frame.html, headtext with CSS link; ODS HTML SELECT ALL; %END
%IF &format = EXCEL inside setup_ods: ODS EXCEL FILE= with style, options(sheet_name=Cover, embedded_titles=yes, embedded_footnotes=yes, frozen_headers=yes); ODS EXCEL SELECT ALL; %END
TITLE1 j=c bold height=14pt report title, TITLE2 Period/Fiscal Year, TITLE3 Prepared by/Date; FOOTNOTE1 Confidential—Executive Distribution Only, FOOTNOTE2 Generated timestamp; %MEND setup_ods
%MACRO exec_summary(period=) opening: documentation header for executive summary with key financial KPIs, outputs work.exec_kpis and work.exec_period_change; %LOCAL n_metrics; %PUT banner with period

PROC SQL NOPRINT inside exec_summary: CREATE TABLE work.exec_kpis via 4 UNION ALL queries from finance.income_statement WHERE period — Revenue (SUM revenue_amount, prior_revenue, budget_amount), EBITDA (SUM ebitda_amount, prior_ebitda, ebitda_budget), Net Income (SUM net_income, prior_net_income, ni_budget), Gross Margin % (SUM gross_profit/revenue_amount*100 ratios); each with current_value, prior_value, budget_value columns; SELECT COUNT(*) INTO :n_metrics TRIMMED; %PUT extracted count

DATA work.exec_period_change inside exec_summary: SET work.exec_kpis; LENGTH trend $10 status $20; pct_change = ((current_value - prior_value) / ABS(prior_value)) * 100 with missing-safe check; budget_var = ((current_value - budget_value) / ABS(budget_value)) * 100; trend indicator: UP (>5%), DOWN (<-5%), FLAT; traffic light status: GREEN (>=0), AMBER (>=-5), RED (<-5); FORMAT pct_change budget_var 8.1

PROC REPORT data=work.exec_period_change NOWD inside exec_summary with STYLE(header)=[backgroundcolor=cx003366 foreground=white font_weight=bold font_size=10pt]; COLUMNS metric_name current_value prior_value pct_change budget_value budget_var status; DEFINE metric_name/GROUP, current_value/SUM comma20.2, prior_value/SUM, pct_change/DISPLAY 8.1, budget_value/SUM, budget_var/DISPLAY, status/DISPLAY font_weight=bold; COMPUTE status: CALL DEFINE for traffic light — GREEN cx90EE90/cx006400, AMBER cxFFD700/cx8B4513, RED cxFF6347/white; ENDCOMP; COMPUTE AFTER: LINE for report period and date; ENDCOMP; %LET sections_done +1; %MEND exec_summary

%MACRO sales_section(region=ALL) opening: documentation header for regional sales analysis with pipeline metrics, outputs work.sales_pipeline, work.sales_quota, work.sales_chart; %LOCAL i n_regions reg; %PUT banner with region

PROC SQL NOPRINT inside sales_section: CREATE TABLE work.sales_pipeline from sales.opportunities s WHERE close_date BETWEEN period_start_dt AND period_end_dt, with conditional %IF &region ne ALL filter; SELECT region, product_line, sales_rep, SUM(pipeline_value) as pipeline, SUM(bookings) as bookings, SUM(quota_amount) as quota, COUNT(DISTINCT deal_id) as deal_count, SUM(bookings)/SUM(quota)*100 as attainment_pct; GROUP BY region, product_line, sales_rep; ORDER BY region, attainment_pct DESC

PROC TABULATE inside sales_section with style=[font_size=9pt cellpadding=4]: CLASS region product_line; VAR bookings pipeline; TABLE product_line='Product Line' ALL='Total', region='Region' * (bookings*sum*f=comma16.2 pipeline*sum*f=comma16.2) ALL='Grand Total' / box='Sales Analysis'; product x region cross-tabulation

DATA work.sales_quota inside sales_section: SET work.sales_pipeline; LENGTH performance_tier $15; quota attainment classification: Exceptional (>=120%), On Target (>=100%), Below Target (>=80%), At Risk (<80%); needs_review flag for attainment_pct < 70; FORMAT needs_review yesno.

%IF &region = ALL %THEN %DO inside sales_section: %LET n_regions = 4; %DO i = 1 %TO &n_regions iterating over NORTH SOUTH EAST WEST via %SCAN; %PUT regional detail; PROC SQL NOPRINT CREATE TABLE work.region_&reg per region with SUM(bookings) total_bookings, SUM(pipeline) total_pipeline, SUM(quota) total_quota, MEAN(attainment_pct) avg_attainment, COUNT(DISTINCT sales_rep) rep_count from work.sales_pipeline WHERE region GROUP BY product_line; %END loop; %END conditional
DATA work.sales_chart inside sales_section: SET work.sales_pipeline; KEEP region bookings pipeline quota attainment_pct for chart-ready PROC SGPLOT visualization data
PROC SORT data=work.sales_chart NODUPKEY BY region inside sales_section for chart data deduplication; %LET sections_done +1; %PUT Sales Section complete; %MEND sales_section

%MACRO hr_section opening: documentation header for workforce analytics covering headcount, turnover, diversity, compensation; outputs work.hr_headcount, work.hr_diversity, work.hr_comp, work.hr_new_hires, work.hr_departures; %LOCAL total_hc turnover_rate n_hires n_departures; %PUT banner

DATA work.hr_headcount inside hr_section: SET hr.employee_roster END=eof WHERE employment_status='ACTIVE' or termination_date in period; tenure_months via INTCK('month', hire_date, period_end_dt), tenure_years; is_turnover flag for TERMINATED within period; RETAIN active_count 0 turnover_count 0 for running totals; IF eof: turnover_rate=(turnover_count/active_count)*100, CALL SYMPUTX('total_hc', active_count), CALL SYMPUTX('turnover_rate', turnover_rate); FORMAT; %PUT headcount and turnover stats

PROC FREQ data=work.hr_headcount NOPRINT inside hr_section WHERE employment_status='ACTIVE': TABLES gender OUT=work.hr_div_gender; TABLES ethnicity OUT=work.hr_div_ethnicity; TABLES department*gender OUT=work.hr_div_dept_gender for cross-tabulated diversity metrics

DATA work.hr_diversity inside hr_section: SET work.hr_div_gender (IN=a RENAME=(gender=value)) work.hr_div_ethnicity (IN=b RENAME=(ethnicity=value)); LENGTH category $30 value $50; IF a THEN category='Gender', IF b THEN category='Ethnicity'; pct=percent; KEEP category value count pct; combines diversity dimension tables into single reporting dataset

PROC MEANS data=work.hr_headcount NOPRINT inside hr_section WHERE employment_status='ACTIVE': CLASS department job_level; VAR base_salary total_compensation; OUTPUT OUT=work.hr_comp with MEAN/MEDIAN/MIN/MAX(base_salary), MEAN(total_compensation)=avg_total_comp, N=emp_count for compensation analysis

PROC SQL NOPRINT inside hr_section: CREATE TABLE work.hr_new_hires from hr.employee_roster WHERE hire_date BETWEEN period dates ORDER BY department, hire_date; SELECT COUNT(*) INTO :n_hires; CREATE TABLE work.hr_departures from work.hr_headcount WHERE is_turnover=1 ORDER BY department, termination_date; SELECT COUNT(*) INTO :n_departures; %PUT hires/departures counts; %LET sections_done +1; %MEND hr_section

%MACRO finance_section opening: documentation header for financial statements — income statement, balance sheet, P&L report, YTD accumulation, and budget variance analysis; outputs work.income_stmt, work.balance_sheet, work.ytd_accum, work.budget_variance; %LOCAL n_line_items total_revenue total_expenses; %PUT banner with fiscal_year

PROC SQL NOPRINT inside finance_section: CREATE TABLE work.income_stmt from finance.gl_detail WHERE fiscal_year AND line_item_category IN (REVENUE, COGS, OPEX, OTHER_INCOME, INTEREST, TAX); SELECT line_item_id, line_item_name, line_item_category, display_order, indent_level, with CASE/SUM for current_amount, budget_amount, ytd_amount, ytd_budget; GROUP BY/ORDER BY display_order; SELECT COUNT(*) INTO :n_line_items; SELECT SUM INTO :total_revenue for REVENUE; SELECT SUM INTO :total_expenses for COGS/OPEX; %PUT line items count

DATA work.balance_sheet inside finance_section: SET finance.trial_balance END=eof WHERE fiscal_year AND period; LENGTH section $20; classification into Current Assets (CASH/AR/INVENTORY/PREPAID/OTHER_CA), Non-Current Assets (PPE/INTANGIBLE/INVESTMENT/OTHER_NCA), Current Liabilities (AP/ACCRUED/ST_DEBT/OTHER_CL), Non-Current Liabilities (LT_DEBT/PENSION/DEFERRED_TAX/OTHER_NCL), Equity (COMMON/RETAINED/AOCI/TREASURY); net_amount based on normal balance direction; RETAIN total_assets 0 total_liabilities 0 total_equity 0 running totals; IF eof: bs_difference = total_assets - total_liabilities - total_equity, WARNING if >0.01; FORMAT comma20.2

PROC REPORT data=work.income_stmt NOWD inside finance_section with STYLE(header)=[backgroundcolor=cx003366 foreground=white font_weight=bold]; COLUMNS display_order indent_level line_item_name current_amount budget_amount ytd_amount ytd_budget; DEFINE display_order/ORDER NOPRINT, indent_level/DISPLAY NOPRINT, line_item_name/DISPLAY, amounts/SUM comma20.2; COMPUTE line_item_name: CALL DEFINE for indent_level 0 bold+cxE8E8E8, level 1 indent=15pt, level 2 indent=30pt italic; ENDCOMP; COMPUTE current_amount: CALL DEFINE red foreground for negatives; ENDCOMP; RBREAK AFTER/SUMMARIZE bold cx003366 white

DATA work.ytd_accum inside finance_section: SET finance.monthly_actuals WHERE fiscal_year; BY line_item_id; RETAIN ytd_running 0; IF first.line_item_id THEN ytd_running=0; ytd_running + monthly_amount for YTD accumulation; months_elapsed via MONTH(period_date); prorated_budget=(annual_budget/12)*months_elapsed; ytd_variance=ytd_running-prorated_budget; ytd_var_pct=(ytd_variance/prorated_budget)*100; FORMAT comma20.2 and 8.1

PROC SQL NOPRINT inside finance_section: CREATE TABLE work.budget_variance from work.income_stmt a; SELECT line_item_category, line_item_name, current_amount, budget_amount, current-budget as variance, CASE percentage var_pct, CASE var_status: FAVORABLE (>5%), UNFAVORABLE (<-5%), ON_TRACK; ORDER BY ABS(variance) DESC; %LET sections_done +1; %PUT Finance Section complete; %MEND finance_section
%MACRO appendix opening: documentation header for supporting tables — top customers, AR aging, methodology notes; outputs work.top_customers, work.methodology; %PUT banner

PROC SQL OUTOBS=20 inside appendix: CREATE TABLE work.top_customers from sales.order_detail s INNER JOIN sales.customer_master c ON customer_id WHERE order_date BETWEEN period dates; SELECT customer_id, customer_name, industry_segment, SUM(revenue_amount) as total_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) as order_count, MAX(order_date) as last_order_date, revenue_share as percentage of total via correlated subquery; GROUP BY customer fields; ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

PROC PRINT data=finance.ar_open_items NOOBS LABEL inside appendix with STYLE(header)=[backgroundcolor=cx003366 foreground=white]; WHERE open_balance > 0; VAR customer_name invoice_id invoice_date due_date open_balance aging_bucket days_past_due; LABEL for Customer, Invoice #, Invoice Date, Due Date, Open Balance, Aging Bucket, Days Past Due; SUM open_balance

DATA work.methodology inside appendix: LENGTH section $50 description $500; 5 OUTPUT statements for methodology notes: Revenue Recognition (ASC 606), EBITDA Calculation (Non-GAAP exclusions), Headcount Methodology (active employees only), Regional Allocation (headcount-weighted revenue ratios), Budget Variance (favorable/unfavorable definitions); %LET sections_done +1; %PUT Appendix complete; %MEND appendix
%MACRO close_ods opening: documentation header for finalizing ODS output and logging report metadata to audit trail; %PUT banner; TITLE clear; FOOTNOTE clear
Three %IF blocks inside close_ods to close active ODS destination: %IF &report_format = PDF: ODS PDF CLOSE; %IF &report_format = HTML: ODS HTML CLOSE; %IF &report_format = EXCEL: ODS EXCEL CLOSE

DATA rptout.report_log inside close_ods: LENGTH report_id $20 report_name $60 format $10 author $30 status $15 distribution $200; report_id=RPT-EXEC-period, report_name, format, author, generated_dt=DATETIME(), sections_cnt, status via IFC(report_rc=0, SUCCESS, ERROR), distribution=dist_list, run_duration=DATETIME()-run_timestamp; FORMAT datetime20. time8.; %PUT metadata logged; %MEND close_ods
Section 3 header (Main Program Execution); %PUT execution banner: EXECUTIVE MANAGEMENT REPORT SUITE v3.0, report_period, report_format, report_author, run_date
Step 1: %setup_ods(format=&report_format, title=&report_title, style=&report_style) invocation to initialize ODS output destination

Step 2: Sequential report section invocations — %exec_summary(period=&report_period), %sales_section(region=ALL), %hr_section, %finance_section, %appendix — generating all five report sections in order
Step 3: %close_ods invocation to finalize ODS output and log report metadata
Step 4: PROC SQL NOPRINT to retrieve email distribution list; SELECT TRIM(distribution) INTO :email_list SEPARATED BY ' ' from rptout.report_log WHERE report_id matches current period

Step 5: Error handling — %IF &report_rc NE 0: %PUT ERROR with return code and sections completed; DATA rptout.report_errors with report_id, error_msg='Generation failed at section N', error_dt=DATETIME() FORMAT datetime20.; %ELSE: %PUT NOTE success with sections_done count

Cleanup: PROC DATASETS LIB=work NOLIST NOWARN; DELETE exec_kpis exec_period_change sales_pipeline sales_quota sales_chart region_NORTH/SOUTH/EAST/WEST hr_headcount hr_diversity hr_div_gender hr_div_ethnicity hr_div_dept_gender hr_comp hr_new_hires hr_departures income_stmt balance_sheet ytd_accum budget_variance top_customers methodology; QUIT

OPTIONS NOMPRINT NOMLOGIC NOSYMBOLGEN reset to defaults; final %PUT completion banner: EXECUTIVE REPORT SUITE COMPLETE, report_period, status via %SYSFUNC(IFC) SUCCESS/FAILED, report delivered to distribution list
